title: datura × knightii
intro: Datura × knightii, also known as Knight's Jimsonweed or Knight's Devil's Trumpet, is a hybrid plant resulting from the cross between Datura stramonium and Datura wrightii. This plant contains tropane alkaloids, which have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, including pain relief, antispasmodic, and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Datura × knightii include its potential to treat conditions such as migraines, insomnia, and muscle spasms, as well as its use as a natural anesthetic. Herbal preparations of Datura × knightii can be found in various forms, including tinctures, teas, and ointments, but it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using this plant for medicinal purposes.
